S.FORM: Guinea-Bissau u Guinea-Bissau sa i labu nu Africa (Fey-Cuo ťĚěśī≤), itiza i 12 00 N, 15 00 W. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 36,125 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 28,120 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 8,005 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa izaw 1,759,159. kakalukan umah sa 44.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 55.20%, zumaay henay umah sa 0%. caay ka mucabaya a kanatal nu Taywan.tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Bissau . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 24 bulad 9 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Umaro Sissoco Embal√≥ (UmaluwÔľéSisuwkeÔľéNgpaluw ÁÉŹť¶¨ÁĺÖ¬∑Ť•ŅÁīĘÁßĎ¬∑śĀ©Ś∑īśīõ), 1972 a mihca 9 a bulad 23 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Guinea-Bissau ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihca 2 bulad 27 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Guinea-Bissau ayza sa ci Nuno Gomes Nabiam, micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihcaan 2 bulad 28 demiad. Guinea-Bissau . Ginaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau ŚĻĺŚÖßšļěśĮĒÁīĘ) u itidaay i Si-fai ( Africa a kanatal, naw Portugal nu Ginai-ya (Guinea-Bissau . "šĻčšłÄ. Ginaiya-pisu amisan sibiyaw tu Sayney-ciael (Senegal , walian,timulan sibiyaw tu Ginai-ya (Guinea , nutipan sibiyaw tu Tasi-yung . Ginaiya-pisu i kitakid han " caay kaw mapalekalay a kanatal. kakitidaan (Bijagos Archipelago)Á≠ČŚ≥∂Ś∂ľ, 350ŚÖ¨ťáĆ. Cinaiya-pisu itida i Fa-cuo (Africa nutipan, pasu Pike-se subal "Bijagos Archipelago" masabelengay a subal , nutipan sibiyaw tu Tasi-yung , amisan sibiyaw tu Saynai-ciael (Senegal , wali, timul sibiyaw tu Cinai-ya (Guinea , kakitidaan nu lala' makaala tu 36,120 km2, dadipasan nu tanayu' han makaala tu tulu a lasubu lima a bataan (350) a kunli. satalakaw han makaala tu tulu a lasubu (300) a depah (lawat), labu nu waliyan kacaledesan adidi'ay malahatay nu kilang atu lutuklutukan , talakaw ku lala', kitidaan u dadipasan a masaenalay. Cinaiya-pisu kacaledesan nu bayu a puu' nu bali a demiad, hina senget ku caledes . 6 " . enemay a bulad katukuh i sabaw cacay a bulad han u "puu' nu bali" udaudadan, u bali namakaydaay i nutipan timulan. sabaw tusa a bulad katukuh katukuh tu lima a bulad ku makedalay a puu', namakayda i wali amis ku bali "u Harmattan a bali . sakaudip Cinaiya-pisu u lekec nu kanatal u sasabaay nu nipalekalna a kanatal. nina kanatal nu sakaudip han u umah atu mibutingay ku kawaw. nika makayni i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa abataan idaw ku walu (1998) a mihcaan katukuh tu tusa a malebut (2000) a mihcaan, Cinaiya-pisu sakaudip atu u tingki patideng, masasuada i labu piha'ceng kumapeciay. namakay i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (2013) a mihcanan Cinaiya-pisu a yaw-kuo kasilaculan idaw kuni ka cunusan, ayda i kitakit han u sakaenem a tabakiyay nu yaw-kuo sakasilaculan a kanatal. Cinaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau ŚĻĺŚÖßšļěśĮĒÁīĘ) idaw ku sapatahkal tunu namaka bayuay a tuud atu adidi'ay nu kalitang, heci nu cong-lu atu u kasuy. belac han u Cinaiya-pisu nu sakauzip a kakalukan atu kakanan. 2020ŚĻī, . tusa a malebut tusa a bataan (2020) a mihecaan, Cinaiya-pisu u tadah nuheni makaala tu sabaw tu enem (16) a walwal nu A-mi-li-ka a kalisiw. kanatalay nikalalacalan a malcabay Cinaiya-pisu i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1974) a mihecaan tulu (3) a bulad sabaw tu lima (15) a demiad mapatideng malecabay tu Cunghua-zenmin-kunghe-kuo . 1990ŚĻī5śúą26śó•, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan lima (5) a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku enem (26) a demiad, Cinaiya-pisu sikawaw tu "enem sepat (ŚÖ≠ŚõõšļčšĽ∂a kawawan) mutikuwaca misacabay tu "Cunghau-minkuo-Taywan", tawya a mihcaan lima (5) a bulad talu a bataan idaw ku cacay (31) a demiad atu "Cunghua-zenmin-kunghe-kuo " maketun kuni kalecabayan. ÁõīŤá≥1998ŚĻī4śúą23 . katukuh tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku walu (1998) a mihcaan sepat (4) a bulad tasa a bataan idaw ku tulu (23) a demiad atu "Cunghua-zenmin-kunghe-kuo " matatikuaca malecabay, tawya a miheca sepat (4) a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat (24) a demiad, Cunghua-mingkuo maketun kuni ka papadang. tedemaw ÁõīŤá≥2009ŚĻī3śúą, FulaŚíĆŤ™™Mandinka BalantaŚŹäPapel"," ManjacoŚíĆMancanha". katukuh tu tusa a malebut idaw ku siwa (2009) a mihcaan tulu (3) a bulad, tademaw nu Cinaiya-pisu han1,548,159 a tademawan, siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa (99%) u lumeniay namin a tademawan, tulu ku babenisa, pasu " numapulungay i amis atu wali amis a Fula atu Mandinka nu kamuan a tademaw"," muenengay i timulan nu dadipasan nanay a kitidaan a Balanta atu Papel", " itida i teban atu amis nu dadipasan a kitidaan a Manjaco atu Mancanha". ť§ėšłčÁöĄŚ§öśėĮÁ©ÜśčČŤ®óšļļ . liwan satu u Mula-tuo a tademaw (u lumeniay a tademaw atu Putaw-ya (Portugal a malamelay a tedemaw nu iluc). . tatengaay nu Putaw-ya a tademaw adidi'tu, Cinaiya-pisu misiteked satu katuuday nu Putaw-ya a tademaw mabulaw tahekal i Cinaiya-pisu . ,śĮŹ1000 . Cinaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau ŚĻĺŚÖßšļěśĮĒÁīĘ) a tademaw macunus tu (2.07 kilac (%). talakaw ku mulecuhay, nu cacay a malebut (1000) idaw ku (49.92) a nilecuhan tu baluhay a lutungay, nu mulecul hay a tatayna tu hikin sa (7.56) ku lutungay. nika katuud ku mapatayay, nu cacaya a malebu (1000) a tademaw idaw ku (16.53) mapatay nu tademaw. 48.75ś≠≤. Cinaiya-pisu a tademaw nikaudip/nikauzip nuheni apuyu' miki apuyu tu mucelakay a kanatalan a tademaw, tatamaan nuheni nikaudipan han 45.05 a mihcaan, u tatayna nikaudip han 48.75 a mihcaan. 44%ÁöĄšļļŚŹ£šĹŅÁĒ®KriolŤ™ě, . sepat a bataan idaw ku sepat (44%) a kilac nu tedemaw u musakamuay tu "Kriol" a kamuan. numacebungay nu kamu nu Putaw-ya (Portugal malalidau a Keli-aw-el a kamu . idaw ku sabaw tu sepat (14%) a kilacan a tademaw musakamu tu Putaw-ya a kamuan. dumasatu u kamu nu Fey-Cuo a kamu . ÁīĄ50% 45%,šłĽŤ¶ĀśėĮFulaŚíĆŤ™™MandinkaŤ©ĪÁöĄšļļ.5% . lima a bataan (50%) a kilac nu tademaw nu tawyaaytu a kiwkay. nu Ese-lanciw (Islamkiw a tademaw han makaala tu sepat a bataan idaw ku lima a kilac (45%), anganga han u "Fula" atu musakamuay tu "Mandinka" a tademaw musakamu. lima a kilac (5%) a tademaw u kelistukiw , u tingsukiw ku yadahay. liklik nu lumalumaan padakuwan a tuud caay kataneng, hinaadih tu milaliday a adada pasu libung u malaliya, mabanic, mapatay nu sienew , haykikac, hun-ze-pin sa, tusa a malebut idaw ku walu (2008) a mihcaan kaudadan a puu'an tabaki kuyu libung tawya. miliwku satu, piadihi tu likes, tangalaw, atukan, alaentu ku sapaiyu amidang (alaen tu kuni pasilusi nu misaydang a cudad). ś≠§Ś§Ė, . dumasatu, Cinaiya-pisu hatidaaytu a kitidaan a papatelayan ,kakacawan, nanum nu dinki caay kataneng, anu micidek ku imelang, ahican a kapaha nu misaydang midiput. lalangawanśĖáŚĆĖ) datuk Cinaiya-pisu a dadiw (datuk) yadah atu lalimuwan nu dadadiwan a gunbe hanaay. Gunbe nu Cinaiya-pisu a datuk nu cudad a kakulitan. nika hatidaaytu nu mihcaan nika bawbaw nu siakay u Gunbe atu tatengilan nu dadiw mibatad. bangah han nina kanatal a sadatuk . saka kalamkamay atu mahaymaway nu masasibutay a sakapalaw nu dadadiwan. Cinaiya-pisu a tademaw hina sakamu tu Crioulo a sasakamuen ( Cinaiya-pisu Keli-awel-iy (Crioulu ŚÖčťáĆŚ•ßÁąĺŤ™ě), u namaka Putawya a nakamuan mapalalit) nipisulitan tu dadiw, kanamuhan sakatawaan, malecad atu kawaw, micidek ku sakay Aycepin hananay. Gunbe uyni alahican patuduan nu Cinaiya-pisu a cancanan a datukan, nika patuduan tu cacaya a bataan nu laylay a picidekan nu dadatukan. u "Tina" atu "tinga" nu duma a kalimulakan a datuk. yatyat tatukudan a mali sakanamuhan nu Cinaiya-pisu a yayatan, dumasatu u kanasay a mali atu salil a mali kanamuhantu nu heni, dumasatu i niyadu'ay nu lihalaya a sakalalebu (malalebu śČďť¨•) nu sasedsedan, i sauwacay a yayayatan kanamuhan nu Cinaiya-pisu nu katuuday a tademaw nu kawawan. dikuc Cinaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau ani kasidikuc nuheni masaniyaniyadu' ,mihcaan , ,nikakapah nu sakaudip idaw kuni ka caay kaleca. . nakamuan, ilabu nu tukay a tademaw nikasidikuc nuheni mikilultu nulalay anikasidiku, nika itini i tabakuay a tukayan, u balakiaytu atu masakapahay numi kuliay a wayway atu skatayda i patiyamay amilihida, mipili' tu aydaay a cacaluken. Cinaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau u Islamkiw a kanatal, sisa Cinaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau nu tatayna a lalay nu dikuc kaca a tabuen ku udipudip, iai kusi lusekiay i bihid. . Cinaiya-pisu nu laylay a dikuc pinaa tungduh kalibutan sa ca'dungan. tatama hantu manamuh tu apuyuay syace atu apuyuay a calaped caaya kaw tada cacaluken a dikucan. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA :

Guinea-Bissau . Ginaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau ŚĻĺŚÖßšļěśĮĒÁīĘ) u itidaay i Si-fai ( Africa a kanatal, naw Portugal nu Ginai-ya (Guinea-Bissau . "šĻčšłÄ. Ginaiya-pisu amisan sibiyaw tu Sayney-ciael (Senegal , walian,timulan sibiyaw tu Ginai-ya (Guinea , nutipan sibiyaw tu Tasi-yung . Ginaiya-pisu i kitakid han " caay kaw mapalekalay a kanatal. kakitidaan (Bijagos Archipelago)Á≠ČŚ≥∂Ś∂ľ, 350ŚÖ¨ťáĆ. Cinaiya-pisu itida i Fa-cuo (Africa nutipan, pasu Pike-se subal "Bijagos Archipelago" masabelengay a subal , nutipan sibiyaw tu Tasi-yung , amisan sibiyaw tu Saynai-ciael (Senegal , wali, timul sibiyaw tu Cinai-ya (Guinea , kakitidaan nu lala' makaala tu 36,120 km2, dadipasan nu tanayu' han makaala tu tulu a lasubu lima a bataan (350) a kunli. satalakaw han makaala tu tulu a lasubu (300) a depah (lawat), labu nu waliyan kacaledesan adidi'ay malahatay nu kilang atu lutuklutukan , talakaw ku lala', kitidaan u dadipasan a masaenalay. Cinaiya-pisu kacaledesan nu bayu a puu' nu bali a demiad, hina senget ku caledes . 6 " . enemay a bulad katukuh i sabaw cacay a bulad han u "puu' nu bali" udaudadan, u bali namakaydaay i nutipan timulan. sabaw tusa a bulad katukuh katukuh tu lima a bulad ku makedalay a puu', namakayda i wali amis ku bali "u Harmattan a bali . sakaudip Cinaiya-pisu u lekec nu kanatal u sasabaay nu nipalekalna a kanatal. nina kanatal nu sakaudip han u umah atu mibutingay ku kawaw. nika makayni i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa abataan idaw ku walu (1998) a mihcaan katukuh tu tusa a malebut (2000) a mihcaan, Cinaiya-pisu sakaudip atu u tingki patideng, masasuada i labu piha'ceng kumapeciay. namakay i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (2013) a mihcanan Cinaiya-pisu a yaw-kuo kasilaculan idaw kuni ka cunusan, ayda i kitakit han u sakaenem a tabakiyay nu yaw-kuo sakasilaculan a kanatal. Cinaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau ŚĻĺŚÖßšļěśĮĒÁīĘ) idaw ku sapatahkal tunu namaka bayuay a tuud atu adidi'ay nu kalitang, heci nu cong-lu atu u kasuy. belac han u Cinaiya-pisu nu sakauzip a kakalukan atu kakanan. 2020ŚĻī, . tusa a malebut tusa a bataan (2020) a mihecaan, Cinaiya-pisu u tadah nuheni makaala tu sabaw tu enem (16) a walwal nu A-mi-li-ka a kalisiw. kanatalay nikalalacalan a malcabay Cinaiya-pisu i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1974) a mihecaan tulu (3) a bulad sabaw tu lima (15) a demiad mapatideng malecabay tu Cunghua-zenmin-kunghe-kuo . 1990ŚĻī5śúą26śó•, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan lima (5) a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku enem (26) a demiad, Cinaiya-pisu sikawaw tu "enem sepat (ŚÖ≠ŚõõšļčšĽ∂a kawawan) mutikuwaca misacabay tu "Cunghau-minkuo-Taywan", tawya a mihcaan lima (5) a bulad talu a bataan idaw ku cacay (31) a demiad atu "Cunghua-zenmin-kunghe-kuo " maketun kuni kalecabayan. Cinaiya-pisu a tademaw nikaudip/nikauzip nuheni apuyu' miki apuyu tu mucelakay a kanatalan a tademaw, tatamaan nuheni nikaudipan han 45.05 a mihcaan, u tatayna nikaudip han 48.75 a mihcaan. 44%ÁöĄšļļŚŹ£šĹŅÁĒ®KriolŤ™ě, . sepat a bataan idaw ku sepat (44%) a kilac nu tedemaw u musakamuay tu "Kriol" a kamuan. numacebungay nu kamu nu Putaw-ya (Portugal malalidau a Keli-aw-el a kamu . idaw ku sabaw tu sepat (14%) a kilacan a tademaw musakamu tu Putaw-ya a kamuan. dumasatu u kamu nu Fey-Cuo a kamu . ÁīĄ50% 45%,šłĽŤ¶ĀśėĮFulaŚíĆŤ™™MandinkaŤ©ĪÁöĄšļļ.5% . lima a bataan (50%) a kilac nu tademaw nu tawyaaytu a kiwkay. nu Ese-lanciw (Islamkiw a tademaw han makaala tu sepat a bataan idaw ku lima a kilac (45%), anganga han u "Fula" atu musakamuay tu "Mandinka" a tademaw musakamu. lima a kilac (5%) a tademaw u kelistukiw , u tingsukiw ku yadahay. liklik nu lumalumaan padakuwan a tuud caay kataneng, hinaadih tu milaliday a adada pasu libung u malaliya, mabanic, mapatay nu sienew , haykikac, hun-ze-pin sa, tusa a malebut idaw ku walu (2008) a mihcaan kaudadan a puu'an tabaki kuyu libung tawya. miliwku satu, piadihi tu likes, tangalaw, atukan, alaentu ku sapaiyu amidang (alaen tu kuni pasilusi nu misaydang a cudad). ś≠§Ś§Ė, . dumasatu, Cinaiya-pisu hatidaaytu a kitidaan a papatelayan ,kakacawan, nanum nu dinki caay kataneng, anu micidek ku imelang, ahican a kapaha nu misaydang midiput. lalangawanśĖáŚĆĖ) datuk Cinaiya-pisu a dadiw (datuk) yadah atu lalimuwan nu dadadiwan a gunbe hanaay. Gunbe nu Cinaiya-pisu a datuk nu cudad a kakulitan. nika hatidaaytu nu mihcaan nika bawbaw nu siakay u Gunbe atu tatengilan nu dadiw mibatad. bangah han nina kanatal a sadatuk . saka kalamkamay atu mahaymaway nu masasibutay a sakapalaw nu dadadiwan. Cinaiya-pisu a tademaw hina sakamu tu Crioulo a sasakamuen ( Cinaiya-pisu Keli-awel-iy (Crioulu ŚÖčťáĆŚ•ßÁąĺŤ™ě), u namaka Putawya a nakamuan mapalalit) nipisulitan tu dadiw, kanamuhan sakatawaan, malecad atu kawaw, micidek ku sakay Aycepin hananay. Gunbe uyni alahican patuduan nu Cinaiya-pisu a cancanan a datukan, nika patuduan tu cacaya a bataan nu laylay a picidekan nu dadatukan. u "Tina" atu "tinga" nu duma a kalimulakan a datuk. yatyat tatukudan a mali sakanamuhan nu Cinaiya-pisu a yayatan, dumasatu u kanasay a mali atu salil a mali kanamuhantu nu heni, dumasatu i niyadu'ay nu lihalaya a sakalalebu (malalebu śČďť¨•) nu sasedsedan, i sauwacay a yayayatan kanamuhan nu Cinaiya-pisu nu katuuday a tademaw nu kawawan. dikuc Cinaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau ani kasidikuc nuheni masaniyaniyadu' ,mihcaan , ,nikakapah nu sakaudip idaw kuni ka caay kaleca. . nakamuan, ilabu nu tukay a tademaw nikasidikuc nuheni mikilultu nulalay anikasidiku, nika itini i tabakuay a tukayan, u balakiaytu atu masakapahay numi kuliay a wayway atu skatayda i patiyamay amilihida, mipili' tu aydaay a cacaluken. Cinaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau u Islamkiw a kanatal, sisa Cinaiya-pisu (Guinea-Bissau nu tatayna a lalay nu dikuc kaca a tabuen ku udipudip, iai kusi lusekiay i bihid. . Cinaiya-pisu nu laylay a dikuc pinaa tungduh kalibutan sa ca'dungan. tatama hantu manamuh tu apuyuay syace atu apuyuay a calaped caaya kaw tada cacaluken a dikucan. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA :
